scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.backend: set PYTHONUTF8=1&& cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && fastapi dev main.py
scripts.start:prod: concurrently "npm run backend" "cd frontend && npm start" --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "green,blue"
